questions.question: Describe the key differences between encryption and hashing methods used for data protection. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the purpose, strength, and applications of each method

questions.question: A data breach has occurred at a company, exposing sensitive customer information. The company's data protection policy states that they will notify affected individuals within 72 hours. What is the company's primary responsibility in this situation? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Refer to data protection laws and regulations, such as GDPR or CCPA

questions.question: An organization is considering implementing a biometric authentication system to secure access to their network. What are the potential risks and benefits associated with this technology? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Discuss the pros and cons of biometric authentication, including privacy concerns and accuracy issues
